title: Vader's Legacy
content:
{{Top|rwm|ncl}}
{{Canceled|articles}}
'''Vader's Legacy''' is an unpublished article written by [[Abel G. Peña]] and illustrated by [[Joe Corroney]]. It was to be a ''[[Star Wars: Legacy of the Force]]'' tie-in, highlighting the legacy [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] left behind after his death, including species he enslaved, his dark side strongholds, and his various dark side students. [[Faith Reborn: A Sith Destiny|A supplemental article]] appearing on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|''Hyperspace'']] was also expected.

It was originally planned to appear in [[Star Wars Insider 88|''Star Wars Insider'' 88]] but first pushed back to [[Star Wars Insider 90|''Star Wars Insider'' 90]], and then [[Star Wars Insider 92|''Star Wars Insider'' 92]]. On [[October]] [[2009]], in the interview to [[New Jedi Order Encyclopedia]] Abel G. Peña stated that the article was not going to published by Lucasfilm, though parts of it can still be recycled for other projects.<ref>{{WebCite|url=http://www.njoe.com/2009/10/13/njoe-interviews-abel-g-pena|text=NJOE Interviews Abel G Peña…|date=2009-10-13|archivedate=20091119054755}}</ref>

Abel G. Peña has revealed a number of subjects to be covered in this article:
*[[501st Legion/Legends|501st Legion]]
*[[Bast Castle]]
*[[Darth Vader's Palace]]
*[[Flint]]
*[[Kharys]]
*[[Lumiya]]
*[[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]]
*[[Prophet of the Dark Side|Prophets of the Dark Side]]
*[[Vongerella]] {{C|Including name and backstory}}
*[[Domina Tagge/Legends|Domina Tagge]]
*[[Orman Tagge/Legends|Orman Tagge]]
*[[Tao (Sith Apprentice)|Tao]]
*[[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]]
*[[Antinnis Tremayne]]
*[[Vost Tyne]]
*A connection to the "Sinister Alliance" [[Roleplaying game|RPG]] seed from ''[[The Emperor's Pawns]]'', which dealt with [[Carnor Jax]] meeting [[Nom Anor]] and a [[Yuuzhan Vong]]/[[Sith/Legends|Sith]] alliance
Peña allegedly sent a copy to author [[Joseph Bongiorno|Joe Bongiorno]] for research. Bongiorno released ''Vader's Legacy'' on his [https://www.starwarstimeline.net/The%20Archives.htm website] in [[2025]].<ref name="VL">{{WebCite|url=https://www.starwarstimeline.net/The%20Archives.htm|text="Vader's Legacy"|author=[[Abel G. Peña|Abel G. Peña]]|work=[http://www.starwarstimeline.net Star Wars Expanded Universe Timeline]|archiveurl=https://archive.is/OkzqG}}</ref>
